records.m_Talk_ENG: They call the blood in my veins Dragon Blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They call the blood in my veins Dragon Blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They call the blood in my veins Dragon Blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cool, right? Dragon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cool, right? Dragon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cool, right? Dragon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're just Beasts that bring harm to people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're just Beasts that bring harm to people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're just Beasts that bring harm to people.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
How could I ever call it
8v admirable, even as a joke, that I was born with Beast Blood?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
How could I ever call it
8v admirable, even as a joke, that I was born with Beast Blood?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
How could I ever call it
8v admirable, even as a joke, that I was born with Beast Blood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You always look at things from the worst possible angle. That's your problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You always look at things from the worst possible angle. That's your problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You always look at things from the worst possible angle. That's your problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like Commander Myeongdal says, "Being <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> is all about how you accept it."
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like Commander Myeongdal says, "Being <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> is all about how you accept it."
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like Commander Myeongdal says, "Being <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> is all about how you accept it."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to this Dragon Blood, I can still help people with nothing but a sword, even in a world full of guns and bullets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to this Dragon Blood, I can still help people with nothing but a sword, even in a world full of guns and bullets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to this Dragon Blood, I can still help people with nothing but a sword, even in a world full of guns and bullets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And thanks to my blood, our past selves were able to slay dragons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And thanks to my blood, our past selves were able to slay dragons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And thanks to my blood, our past selves were able to slay dragons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, here we go. Bragging about being my savior in a past life again? Not like you even remember it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, here we go. Bragging about being my savior in a past life again? Not like you even remember it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, here we go. Bragging about being my savior in a past life again? Not like you even remember it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? I might just end up saving your life all over again in this one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? I might just end up saving your life all over again in this one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? I might just end up saving your life all over again in this one.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hmm
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hmm
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hmm
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's strange, isn't it? Remembering a time I never lived through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's strange, isn't it? Remembering a time I never lived through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's strange, isn't it? Remembering a time I never lived through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to believe you and I were once hopelessly in love. You're not even my type. I'm all books and brooding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to believe you and I were once hopelessly in love. You're not even my type. I'm all books and brooding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to believe you and I were once hopelessly in love. You're not even my type. I'm all books and brooding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I don't appeal to you, then maybe in this life we're just meant to stay comrades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I don't appeal to you, then maybe in this life we're just meant to stay comrades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I don't appeal to you, then maybe in this life we're just meant to stay comrades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I never said I didn't like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I never said I didn't like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I never said I didn't like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And don't make light of fate. Whether we like it or not, it pulls us along all the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And don't make light of fate. Whether we like it or not, it pulls us along all the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And don't make light of fate. Whether we like it or not, it pulls us along all the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So how about you try a little harder to be charming, hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So how about you try a little harder to be charming, hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So how about you try a little harder to be charming, hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If fate's already decided everything, I don't need to try anything at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If fate's already decided everything, I don't need to try anything at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If fate's already decided everything, I don't need to try anything at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fate means you're going to fall for me whether you want to or not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fate means you're going to fall for me whether you want to or not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fate means you're going to fall for me whether you want to or not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, gross. I'd rather defy fate than end up with someone so full of himself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, gross. I'd rather defy fate than end up with someone so full of himself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, gross. I'd rather defy fate than end up with someone so full of himself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, if that's your choice, I won't object.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, if that's your choice, I won't object.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, if that's your choice, I won't object.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long's it been, and you two already bicker like an old couple?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long's it been, and you two already bicker like an old couple?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long's it been, and you two already bicker like an old couple?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, you'll be asking for a shared room before long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, you'll be asking for a shared room before long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, you'll be asking for a shared room before long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No thanks. Who'd want to live with someone like him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No thanks. Who'd want to live with someone like him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No thanks. Who'd want to live with someone like him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I take it you were looking for us, Commander Myeongdal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I take it you were looking for us, Commander Myeongdal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I take it you were looking for us, Commander Myeongdal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be gone a while to help Dr. Yulia with her research.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be gone a while to help Dr. Yulia with her research.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be gone a while to help Dr. Yulia with her research.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless the Tiger's ascending to these lands, don't come looking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless the Tiger's ascending to these lands, don't come looking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless the Tiger's ascending to these lands, don't come looking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You sure walk off lightly for someone leaving us kids behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You sure walk off lightly for someone leaving us kids behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You sure walk off lightly for someone leaving us kids behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still scared of stepping out of this old man's shadow, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still scared of stepping out of this old man's shadow, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still scared of stepping out of this old man's shadow, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only because you keep dumping this desk-bound, muttering scholar on me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only because you keep dumping this desk-bound, muttering scholar on me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only because you keep dumping this desk-bound, muttering scholar on me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That guy's got the look of a destined prodigy. You should keep an eye on him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That guy's got the look of a destined prodigy. You should keep an eye on him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That guy's got the look of a destined prodigy. You should keep an eye on him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Destined prodigy? He looks more like a sleep-deprived sloth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Destined prodigy? He looks more like a sleep-deprived sloth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Destined prodigy? He looks more like a sleep-deprived sloth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Don't be mean. He's easy on the eyes, at least.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Don't be mean. He's easy on the eyes, at least.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Don't be mean. He's easy on the eyes, at least.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've spent all this time chasing the Tiger to stop more disasters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've spent all this time chasing the Tiger to stop more disasters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've spent all this time chasing the Tiger to stop more disasters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if Ha Dam finishes his <color=#ffd34c>device</color>, everything changes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if Ha Dam finishes his <color=#ffd34c>device</color>, everything changes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if Ha Dam finishes his <color=#ffd34c>device</color>, everything changes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as the Tiger can cross time, we'll be able to do the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as the Tiger can cross time, we'll be able to do the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as the Tiger can cross time, we'll be able to do the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Turn the tables. Just as the Tiger rose to harm us, we'll descend to strike it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Turn the tables. Just as the Tiger rose to harm us, we'll descend to strike it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Turn the tables. Just as the Tiger rose to harm us, we'll descend to strike it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fine image, isn't it? Assuming Ha Dam can pull it off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fine image, isn't it? Assuming Ha Dam can pull it off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fine image, isn't it? Assuming Ha Dam can pull it off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, he will. He's the smartest guy the Administration's got.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, he will. He's the smartest guy the Administration's got.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, he will. He's the smartest guy the Administration's got.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I leave the big work to you two young geniuses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I leave the big work to you two young geniuses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I leave the big work to you two young geniuses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's regroup once our tasks are done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's regroup once our tasks are done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's regroup once our tasks are done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was that meant to compliment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was that meant to compliment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was that meant to compliment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You know
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You know
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You know
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: The part where you said I'll definitely pull it off, and being the smartest guy in the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The part where you said I'll definitely pull it off, and being the smartest guy in the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The part where you said I'll definitely pull it off, and being the smartest guy in the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You call that a compliment? I was just stating facts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You call that a compliment? I was just stating facts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You call that a compliment? I was just stating facts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still made me feel good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still made me feel good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still made me feel good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What, you expect praise and then just walk away without giving anything back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What, you expect praise and then just walk away without giving anything back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What, you expect praise and then just walk away without giving anything back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ever heard of give and take?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ever heard of give and take?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ever heard of give and take?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't we moving a bit fast here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't we moving a bit fast here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't we moving a bit fast here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow. You really haven't dated anyone, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow. You really haven't dated anyone, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow. You really haven't dated anyone, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's called a treat, genius. Buy me something nice, like dried persimmons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's called a treat, genius. Buy me something nice, like dried persimmons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's called a treat, genius. Buy me something nice, like dried persimmons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were lugging around a whole basket of those last time. Still not tired of them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were lugging around a whole basket of those last time. Still not tired of them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were lugging around a whole basket of those last time. Still not tired of them?

But Commander Myeongdal did tell you to keep an eye on me
8v

But Commander Myeongdal did tell you to keep an eye on me
8v

But Commander Myeongdal did tell you to keep an eye on me
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I'll share. You'll need the sugar to stay sharp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I'll share. You'll need the sugar to stay sharp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll share. You'll need the sugar to stay sharp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I'll be sure to keep the compliments coming too. Deal?

records.m_Talk_FRA: And I'll be sure to keep the compliments coming too. Deal?

Fate
8v What a cruel thing it is, toying with people's hearts.

Fate
8v What a cruel thing it is, toying with people's hearts.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Fate
8v What a cruel thing it is, toying with people's hearts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That feeling, waiting for something you know will come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That feeling, waiting for something you know will come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That feeling, waiting for something you know will come.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That feeling, staring at a stone you know will hit you and still not moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That feeling, staring at a stone you know will hit you and still not moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That feeling, staring at a stone you know will hit you and still not moving.

8v Then maybe it wouldn't hurt so much.

8v Then maybe it wouldn't hurt so much.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Master, are you asleep?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Andy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Andy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Andy?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Showing up here at this hour? The sun must be rising in the west.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Showing up here at this hour? The sun must be rising in the west.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get your hopes up. I didn't come to help with work or anything.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get your hopes up. I didn't come to help with work or anything.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Just figured we could talk for a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Talk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Talk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Talk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sharpening your sword, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sharpening your sword, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sharpening your sword, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't use it often, but when the blade dulls, it makes me uneasy.

Even if I eat right and stock up on Eternium
8v I've no idea when, or if, I'll get the chance to go back again.

8v You really think you can change how it ends?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Andy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Andy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Andy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never forced you to follow me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never forced you to follow me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never forced you to follow me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: What I want to change is a past that has nothing to do with you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you telling me that? You're alive too, aren't you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mobilize all TASKFORCEs that can regroup. Prioritize resident safety.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Mobilize all TASKFORCEs that can regroup. Prioritize resident safety.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How many unofficial Counters are in the area?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How many unofficial Counters are in the area?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How many unofficial Counters are in the area?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We estimate at least six. Two Grade Ds and one Grade C we contacted have already refused. We've lost contact with the rest due to the Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We estimate at least six. Two Grade Ds and one Grade C we contacted have already refused. We've lost contact with the rest due to the Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We estimate at least six. Two Grade Ds and one Grade C we contacted have already refused. We've lost contact with the rest due to the Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll try to contact the rest myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll try to contact the rest myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll try to contact the rest myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We need to buy time until the TASKFORCE arrives
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We need to buy time until the TASKFORCE arrives
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We need to buy time until the TASKFORCE arrives
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple large C.O.s incoming! Ogre-type! They've breached the southern defense lines!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple large C.O.s incoming! Ogre-type! They've breached the southern defense lines!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple large C.O.s incoming! Ogre-type! They've breached the southern defense lines!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Already?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Already?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Already?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something's coming! Get the people on the transport out of here, now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something's coming! Get the people on the transport out of here, now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something's coming! Get the people on the transport out of here, now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Squad Two's still out rescuing kids!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Squad Two's still out rescuing kids!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Squad Two's still out rescuing kids!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just go already! You want us all to die here?! Hit the gas! Hit it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just go already! You want us all to die here?! Hit the gas! Hit it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just go already! You want us all to die here?! Hit the gas! Hit it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just hang in there a little longer! We're almost there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just hang in there a little longer! We're almost there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just hang in there a little longer! We're almost there!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff
8v* *Huff
8v*
records.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff
8v* *Huff
8v*
records.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff
8v* *Huff
8v*

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Seoyeon must've made it out by now, right
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Seoyeon must've made it out by now, right
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Seoyeon must've made it out by now, right
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's huge!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's huge!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's huge!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Open fire!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Open fire!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Open fire!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Bullets aren't working
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Bullets aren't working
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Bullets aren't working
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Is this
8v the end
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Is this
8v the end
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Is this
8v the end
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You're that woman from before
8v!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You're that woman from before
8v!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You're that woman from before
8v!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll hold them off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll hold them off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll hold them off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay! We'll leave it to you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay! We'll leave it to you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay! We'll leave it to you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You too. Go help your master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You too. Go help your master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You too. Go help your master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You sure you'll be okay? Those C.O.s aren't exactly small.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You sure you'll be okay? Those C.O.s aren't exactly small.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You sure you'll be okay? Those C.O.s aren't exactly small.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your master's going to jump into that Vortex Scar. If he face the past in that place, he might never make it out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your master's going to jump into that Vortex Scar. If he face the past in that place, he might never make it out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your master's going to jump into that Vortex Scar. If he face the past in that place, he might never make it out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the only one who can stop him from doing something reckless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the only one who can stop him from doing something reckless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the only one who can stop him from doing something reckless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get hurt! You better come back safe, got it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't get hurt! You better come back safe, got it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get hurt! You better come back safe, got it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They call the blood in my veins Dragon Blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They call the blood in my veins Dragon Blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They call the blood in my veins Dragon Blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cool, right? Dragon!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cool, right? Dragon!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cool, right? Dragon!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're just Beasts that bring harm to people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're just Beasts that bring harm to people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're just Beasts that bring harm to people.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
How could I ever call it
8v admirable, even as a joke, that I was born with Beast Blood?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
How could I ever call it
8v admirable, even as a joke, that I was born with Beast Blood?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
How could I ever call it
8v admirable, even as a joke, that I was born with Beast Blood?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You always look at things from the worst possible angle. That's your problem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You always look at things from the worst possible angle. That's your problem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You always look at things from the worst possible angle. That's your problem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like Commander Myeongdal says, "Being <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> is all about how you accept it."
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like Commander Myeongdal says, "Being <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> is all about how you accept it."
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like Commander Myeongdal says, "Being <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> is all about how you accept it."

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to this Dragon Blood, I can still help people with nothing but a sword, even in a world full of guns and bullets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to this Dragon Blood, I can still help people with nothing but a sword, even in a world full of guns and bullets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to this Dragon Blood, I can still help people with nothing but a sword, even in a world full of guns and bullets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And thanks to my blood, our past selves were able to slay dragons.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And thanks to my blood, our past selves were able to slay dragons.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And thanks to my blood, our past selves were able to slay dragons.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, here we go. Bragging about being my savior in a past life again? Not like you even remember it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, here we go. Bragging about being my savior in a past life again? Not like you even remember it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, here we go. Bragging about being my savior in a past life again? Not like you even remember it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? I might just end up saving your life all over again in this one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? I might just end up saving your life all over again in this one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? I might just end up saving your life all over again in this one.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Hmm
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Hmm
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Hmm
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's strange, isn't it? Remembering a time I never lived through.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's strange, isn't it? Remembering a time I never lived through.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's strange, isn't it? Remembering a time I never lived through.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to believe you and I were once hopelessly in love. You're not even my type. I'm all books and brooding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to believe you and I were once hopelessly in love. You're not even my type. I'm all books and brooding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to believe you and I were once hopelessly in love. You're not even my type. I'm all books and brooding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I don't appeal to you, then maybe in this life we're just meant to stay comrades.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I don't appeal to you, then maybe in this life we're just meant to stay comrades.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I don't appeal to you, then maybe in this life we're just meant to stay comrades.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I never said I didn't like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I never said I didn't like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I never said I didn't like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And don't make light of fate. Whether we like it or not, it pulls us along all the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And don't make light of fate. Whether we like it or not, it pulls us along all the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And don't make light of fate. Whether we like it or not, it pulls us along all the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So how about you try a little harder to be charming, hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So how about you try a little harder to be charming, hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So how about you try a little harder to be charming, hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If fate's already decided everything, I don't need to try anything at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If fate's already decided everything, I don't need to try anything at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If fate's already decided everything, I don't need to try anything at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fate means you're going to fall for me whether you want to or not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fate means you're going to fall for me whether you want to or not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fate means you're going to fall for me whether you want to or not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, gross. I'd rather defy fate than end up with someone so full of himself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, gross. I'd rather defy fate than end up with someone so full of himself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, gross. I'd rather defy fate than end up with someone so full of himself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, if that's your choice, I won't object.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, if that's your choice, I won't object.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, if that's your choice, I won't object.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How long's it been, and you two already bicker like an old couple?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How long's it been, and you two already bicker like an old couple?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How long's it been, and you two already bicker like an old couple?

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, you'll be asking for a shared room before long.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, you'll be asking for a shared room before long.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, you'll be asking for a shared room before long.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No thanks. Who'd want to live with someone like him?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No thanks. Who'd want to live with someone like him?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No thanks. Who'd want to live with someone like him?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I take it you were looking for us, Commander Myeongdal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I take it you were looking for us, Commander Myeongdal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I take it you were looking for us, Commander Myeongdal?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be gone a while to help Dr. Yulia with her research.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be gone a while to help Dr. Yulia with her research.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be gone a while to help Dr. Yulia with her research.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unless the Tiger's ascending to these lands, don't come looking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unless the Tiger's ascending to these lands, don't come looking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unless the Tiger's ascending to these lands, don't come looking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You sure walk off lightly for someone leaving us kids behind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You sure walk off lightly for someone leaving us kids behind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You sure walk off lightly for someone leaving us kids behind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still scared of stepping out of this old man's shadow, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still scared of stepping out of this old man's shadow, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still scared of stepping out of this old man's shadow, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only because you keep dumping this desk-bound, muttering scholar on me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only because you keep dumping this desk-bound, muttering scholar on me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only because you keep dumping this desk-bound, muttering scholar on me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That guy's got the look of a destined prodigy. You should keep an eye on him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That guy's got the look of a destined prodigy. You should keep an eye on him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That guy's got the look of a destined prodigy. You should keep an eye on him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Destined prodigy? He looks more like a sleep-deprived sloth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Destined prodigy? He looks more like a sleep-deprived sloth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Destined prodigy? He looks more like a sleep-deprived sloth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Don't be mean. He's easy on the eyes, at least.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Don't be mean. He's easy on the eyes, at least.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Don't be mean. He's easy on the eyes, at least.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've spent all this time chasing the Tiger to stop more disasters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've spent all this time chasing the Tiger to stop more disasters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've spent all this time chasing the Tiger to stop more disasters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if Ha Dam finishes his <color=#ffd34c>device</color>, everything changes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if Ha Dam finishes his <color=#ffd34c>device</color>, everything changes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if Ha Dam finishes his <color=#ffd34c>device</color>, everything changes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as the Tiger can cross time, we'll be able to do the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as the Tiger can cross time, we'll be able to do the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as the Tiger can cross time, we'll be able to do the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Turn the tables. Just as the Tiger rose to harm us, we'll descend to strike it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Turn the tables. Just as the Tiger rose to harm us, we'll descend to strike it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Turn the tables. Just as the Tiger rose to harm us, we'll descend to strike it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A fine image, isn't it? Assuming Ha Dam can pull it off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A fine image, isn't it? Assuming Ha Dam can pull it off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A fine image, isn't it? Assuming Ha Dam can pull it off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, he will. He's the smartest guy the Administration's got.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, he will. He's the smartest guy the Administration's got.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, he will. He's the smartest guy the Administration's got.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I leave the big work to you two young geniuses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I leave the big work to you two young geniuses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I leave the big work to you two young geniuses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's regroup once our tasks are done.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's regroup once our tasks are done.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's regroup once our tasks are done.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was that meant to compliment?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was that meant to compliment?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was that meant to compliment?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You know
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You know
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You know
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: The part where you said I'll definitely pull it off, and being the smartest guy in the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The part where you said I'll definitely pull it off, and being the smartest guy in the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The part where you said I'll definitely pull it off, and being the smartest guy in the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You call that a compliment? I was just stating facts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You call that a compliment? I was just stating facts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You call that a compliment? I was just stating facts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still made me feel good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still made me feel good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still made me feel good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What, you expect praise and then just walk away without giving anything back?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What, you expect praise and then just walk away without giving anything back?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What, you expect praise and then just walk away without giving anything back?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ever heard of give and take?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ever heard of give and take?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ever heard of give and take?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't we moving a bit fast here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't we moving a bit fast here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't we moving a bit fast here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow. You really haven't dated anyone, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow. You really haven't dated anyone, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow. You really haven't dated anyone, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's called a treat, genius. Buy me something nice, like dried persimmons.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's called a treat, genius. Buy me something nice, like dried persimmons.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's called a treat, genius. Buy me something nice, like dried persimmons.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were lugging around a whole basket of those last time. Still not tired of them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were lugging around a whole basket of those last time. Still not tired of them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were lugging around a whole basket of those last time. Still not tired of them?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But Commander Myeongdal did tell you to keep an eye on me
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But Commander Myeongdal did tell you to keep an eye on me
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But Commander Myeongdal did tell you to keep an eye on me
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I'll share. You'll need the sugar to stay sharp.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I'll share. You'll need the sugar to stay sharp.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll share. You'll need the sugar to stay sharp.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I'll be sure to keep the compliments coming too. Deal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I'll be sure to keep the compliments coming too. Deal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I'll be sure to keep the compliments coming too. Deal?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Fate
8v What a cruel thing it is, toying with people's hearts.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Fate
8v What a cruel thing it is, toying with people's hearts.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Fate
8v What a cruel thing it is, toying with people's hearts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That feeling, waiting for something you know will come.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That feeling, waiting for something you know will come.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That feeling, waiting for something you know will come.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That feeling, staring at a stone you know will hit you and still not moving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That feeling, staring at a stone you know will hit you and still not moving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That feeling, staring at a stone you know will hit you and still not moving.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If only
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If only
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If only
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If only that bond weren't fate
8v Then maybe it wouldn't hurt so much.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If only that bond weren't fate
8v Then maybe it wouldn't hurt so much.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If only that bond weren't fate
8v Then maybe it wouldn't hurt so much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Master, are you asleep?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Master, are you asleep?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Master, are you asleep?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Andy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Andy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Andy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Showing up here at this hour? The sun must be rising in the west.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Showing up here at this hour? The sun must be rising in the west.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Showing up here at this hour? The sun must be rising in the west.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get your hopes up. I didn't come to help with work or anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't get your hopes up. I didn't come to help with work or anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get your hopes up. I didn't come to help with work or anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just figured we could talk for a bit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just figured we could talk for a bit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just figured we could talk for a bit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Talk?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Talk?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Talk?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sharpening your sword, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sharpening your sword, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sharpening your sword, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't use it often, but when the blade dulls, it makes me uneasy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't use it often, but when the blade dulls, it makes me uneasy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't use it often, but when the blade dulls, it makes me uneasy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or maybe you were anxious and needed something to do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or maybe you were anxious and needed something to do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or maybe you were anxious and needed something to do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Guilty as charged.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Guilty as charged.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Guilty as charged.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Even if I eat right and stock up on Eternium
8v I've no idea when, or if, I'll get the chance to go back again.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Even if I eat right and stock up on Eternium
8v I've no idea when, or if, I'll get the chance to go back again.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Even if I eat right and stock up on Eternium
8v I've no idea when, or if, I'll get the chance to go back again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really have to go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really have to go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really have to go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you getting at?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you getting at?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you getting at?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Even the Administration's elites had to risk their lives for this fight
8v You really think you can change how it ends?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Even the Administration's elites had to risk their lives for this fight
8v You really think you can change how it ends?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Even the Administration's elites had to risk their lives for this fight
8v You really think you can change how it ends?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Even by some miracle you win, who's to say the past
8v will change the way you want? Can you even bring them back?
